title: Summary: Turn 989
content: Created 4 new test files (45 tests total) covering heuristic extraction, media text, and JSON store; fixed IOException in ObsidianExportCommand. Pending compile errors: Snapshot constructor/import and RelationType.RELATED_TO in JsonFileKnowledgeBaseStoreTest; InferenceConfig constructor mismatch in KnowledgeBaseTest (lines 320,527).
